inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 cash from operations $545.9M ÷ ~69.0M diluted shares (10-K FY2025); asset-light, minimal maintenance capital spending
inputs.book_per_share_caveat: GAAP book excludes Assigned 1888 land and royalty interests (zero on balance sheet); not a fair-value or dhando floor
inputs.normalization_note: Lawrence base on reported operating cash flow per share; FY2025 included $50M equity-method investment (non-recurring scale) not deducted from base.

optionality_gate.notes: GAAP book ~$21/sh is retained earnings + PPE/water + acquired royalties only. ~882k surface acres and ~224k NRA from 1888 Trust carry zero on balance sheet per 10-K. NAV overlay required before book-based dhando.

nav_overlay.status: partial — filing facts + one acquisition comp; full SOTP pending

gaap_vs_fair_value.policy_source: 10-K FY2025: fair market value not determined in 1888; no value assigned to Assigned land and royalty interests
gaap_vs_fair_value.stockholders_equity_note: Mostly accumulated operating earnings; not land mark-to-market

not_in_model_requires_refresh: Fair-value NAV: surface acres ($/acre comps or land-sale marks)
NRA fair value roll-up (assigned + acquired; not only marginal purchase comp)
Undeveloped-acreage royalty option (future drilling not in 5% base growth)
Water infrastructure replacement cost vs PPE net $164.5M

mar_2025_nra_acquisition.caveat: Marginal proved/acquired NRA only; assigned 1888 interests still at zero on BS

illustrative_comps.nra_comp_note: [Assumption] 224k NRA × $19,775 — royalty slice only; excludes 882k surface acres and water PPE

bear.notes: Permian activity flat; multiple compresses toward high-teens cash-flow multiple

base.notes: Mid-single-digit cash-flow growth; water + easements offset slower royalty growth; re-rate modest

bull.notes: Permian volumes + water infrastructure step-up; premium toll multiple sustained

overlay_results.key_inputs: Equity $1.46B ÷ 69M sh ≈ $21/sh; Assigned land/RRA at zero
overlay_results.notes: 10-K: no value assigned to 1888 Assigned land and royalty interests
[Assumption] Does not value surface acres or water infra; not stance gate
